Non-Breathing Meditation Technique: Objectless Intensity: Summon intense feelings of unconditional appreciation or raw curiosity without focusing on a specific thought.
Waking Mind: Active problem-solving or typical verbal internal monologue and analytical thought.
Panoramic Awareness: Soften your visual or mental focus to a wide horizon; attend to the spaces between objects or thoughts.
The Analog Firewall: Think exclusively in 3D geometric shapes or spatial designs; completely banish verbal words from your mind.
The Void: Focus on absolute nothingness and silence; imagine existing as a single point of awareness in a quiet dark ocean.
